chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-507 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 14.05.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ahmed Bhatti, Advocate alongwith Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Sarfaraz Ali M. Abbasi, Advocate for Respondents No.2 & 3. ------ At the very outset, learned counsel for respondents No.2 & 3 files Payment Sheet under the cover of his statement dated 14.05.2025, taken on record. He submits that since the purpose of instant petition has been served; therefore, same may be disposed of. Learned counsel for the petitioner alongwith petitioner after going through the statement, submits that grievance of the petitioner has been ventilated, therefore, under the instructions, he does not wish to press this petition. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh has no objection. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
